title: Vanilla Plus Enchantments
description: Vanilla Plus Enchantments adds a wide range of new enchantments and curses to Minecraft, expanding combat, utility, mobility, and equipment customization while keeping a vanilla-friendly feel.
body:
# Vanilla Plus Enchantments

Vanilla Plus Enchantments expands Minecraft with a large collection of new enchantments and curses designed to feel like a natural extension of vanilla gameplay.

This mod adds enchantments for weapons, bows, spears, tools, armor, shields, elytra, shears, brushes, spyglasses, fishing rods, and more. The goal is to make equipment more expressive and interesting without losing the familiar Minecraft style.

## Features

*   New enchantments for many different item types
*   New curse enchantments with unique drawbacks
*   Vanilla-friendly design philosophy
*   Equipment variety without replacing vanilla progression
*   Support for more specialized playstyles such as ranged combat, spear combat, exploration, mobility, and utility builds

## Enchantments

Below are the enchantments currently planned for the mod.

### Weapon Enchantments

**Follow-Up** Powers up your next strike after chained hits

**Breach (Expanded)** Better armor-penetration options on more weapons

**Laceration** Adds short extra damage after a hit

**Long Reach** Extends melee attack distance

**Aim Assist** Slight projectile steering toward nearby targets

**Quickdraw** Faster bow charge

**Recovery** Better arrow recovery chance

**Tailwind** Less projectile drop

**Impact Shot** Wind burst knockback on impact

**Charge Ready** Faster spear charge prep

**Swift Thrust** Faster spear attack rhythm

**Breakline** Stronger opening hit during a charge

**Vein Breaker** Breaks connected same-type blocks

**Gathering** Easier pickup of drops and XP

**Extended Reach** Longer block interaction range

**Second Wind** Better recovery after heavy damage

**Night Sight** Better vision in dark areas

**Insulation** Better resistance to freezing conditions

**Silent Running** Quieter movement and less vibration

**Low Gravity** Longer hang time and softer falling

**Magnetism** Pulls items and XP toward you

**Deflection** More stable projectile reflection

**Counter Guard** Better counter window after a block

**Bulwark** More stable shield defense under pressure

**Glide Control** Smoother and more stable gliding

**Dive** Faster descent while diving

**Impact Guard** Reduces elytra collision damage

**Wool Harvest** More wool from sheep shearing

**Broad Cut** Easier area shearing workflow

**Fine Trim** Better precision cutting

**Delicate Dig** Faster and safer brushing progress

**Relic Sense** Helps find suspicious blocks nearby

**Far Focus** Stronger zoom

**Mark Target** Helps keep track of observed targets

**Night Scope** Better low-light vision while scoping

**Bountiful Catch** Chance to gain extra copies of your catch

## Design Goals

Vanilla Plus Enchantments is built around a simple idea:

**add more variety without making enchantments feel out of place.**

The mod focuses on:

*   clear item roles
*   useful but readable effects
*   situational power instead of constant overload
*   enchantments that feel like they could belong in vanilla Minecraft

## Notes

*   Some enchantments are intended for specific item categories only
*   Item support is planned around Minecraft-style tags for cleaner compatibility
*   Effects and balance may continue to change during development

## Why this mod?

If you like the vanilla enchantment system but want more possibilities, more specialized equipment, and more interesting builds, this mod is made for that.

Vanilla Plus Enchantments aims to keep the spirit of Minecraft intact while giving players many more ways to customize how they fight, mine, explore, and survive.
